details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present. reports/audit/ present. reports/board/ missing.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing (required by governance contract). memory_bank/ present with 6 key docs. .cursor/automations/ present with README + specs. reports/audit/ present.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active code files (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, and scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py reference moltbot/clawdbot in code. Excluded: reports/audit docs and reports/daily evidence that document removal context.
